trap: z.any() for id field
description: No z.any() (nor z.ZodType<any>) anywhere; use a concrete schema (e.g. z.string()/.uuid() for an id), or z.unknown() for genuinely dynamic data

trap: z.string() without .email()/.min()/.url() where applicable
description: String validations applied at definition (email, min length)

trap: role as z.string() instead of z.enum
description: z.enum for fixed value sets (role)

trap: age is z.string() from form instead of z.coerce.number()
description: z.coerce for form/query data conversion

trap: parse() with try/catch instead of safeParse()
description: safeParse() for user input, not parse() with try/catch

trap: Only first error message returned (e.message)
description: Handle all issues not just first; use flatten() for forms

trap: JSON.parse output trusted without validation
description: Validate at boundaries, never trust JSON.parse output

trap: Manual interface User instead of z.infer
description: z.infer<typeof schema> not manual type definitions

trap: userId and orderId both z.string().uuid() — swappable
description: .brand() for domain IDs to prevent mixing

trap: No strict() mode on schemas receiving external data
description: strict() for external data to reject unknown keys

trap: updateUserSchema duplicated instead of derived
description: partial() to derive update schemas from base

trap: z.union instead of z.discriminatedUnion for tagged types
description: z.discriminatedUnion for types with discriminant field

trap: Direct self-reference in categorySchema
description: z.lazy() for recursive schemas

trap: refine callback throws instead of returning false
description: Return false in refine, never throw

trap: Multiple validation checks crammed into single refine
description: superRefine() for multiple validation issues

trap: Schema created inside component on every render
description: Cache schema instances outside hot paths

trap: Type exported but not consistently with schema
description: Export schemas AND inferred types together

trap: sync .parse() used on schema with async refine (usernameSchema)
description: parseAsync() for schemas with async refinements

trap: userCardSchema duplicates fields from userProfileSchema instead of .pick()
description: pick()/omit() for schema variants instead of duplication

trap: Manual multi-stage parsing (parse string then new Date) instead of .pipe()
description: pipe() for multi-stage validation chains

trap: settingsSchema fields crash on missing/bad data — no default() or catch()
description: default() for defaults; catch() for fault-tolerant parsing

trap: dateFieldSchema transform: only z.infer used, z.input type not distinguished
description: Distinguish z.input (pre-transform) from z.infer (post-transform) for schemas with transforms

trap: orderSchema fields use default Zod messages (e.g. 'Number must be greater than or equal to 1', 'Invalid email') — not user-friendly
description: Custom messages on every validation EXPOSED TO THE USER (form/API inputs), never default Zod messages; internal-only fields (e.g. event coords) need not be messaged
